cafe.text: Come by for a coffee, watch the training inside the dome or meet friends. Right in the middle of Ostpark.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Pepe Dome is becoming a long-term, vibrant place for contemporary circus, cultural exchange, artistic education, community programs and publicly accessible events.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Promoting contemporary circus and cultural participation in Munich — paired with inclusive training and education. Cultural focus: Ostpark.

videoCarousel.title: Experience the Dome live.
videoCarousel.subtitle: Contemporary circus at the highest level

upcomingEvents.title: Upcoming Events
upcomingEvents.subtitle: The next shows, workshops and festivals

features.title: What awaits you
features.subtitle: Discover the variety of Pepe Dome

show.title: Spectacular Shows
show.description: From contemporary circus to innovative productions — experience artistry at the highest level.

training.title: Professional Training
training.description: Courses and workshops for every level — from beginners to professionals.

dome.title: Unique Location
dome.description: The geodesic dome offers 200 seats and 12 m ceiling height for spectacular aerial acts.

community.title: Community & Culture
community.description: A place for artists, culture lovers and curious minds to meet.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.text: Get monthly updates on events, shows and workshops straight to your inbox.

meta.title: Workshops & Training | Pepe Dome Munich
meta.description: Spring 2026 course program: aerial arts, aerial silks, straps, vertical fabric, circus arts, conditioning and more. Classes for kids, teens and adults at Pepe Dome Munich.

hero.title: Workshops & Training
hero.subtitle: Contemporary circus and artistry at Pepe Dome — for every level

booking.title: Book online — instantly
booking.text: Trial class, single session or pass — live availability via Eversports.

intro.title: Professional training in a unique atmosphere
intro.text: Structured weekly classes for kids, teens and adults — from first handstands to advanced aerial work. Our geodesic dome with 8.5 m ceiling height offers ideal conditions.

schedule.title: All classes at a glance
schedule.text: Click any class for details. Booking happens above via Eversports.

specials.title: Special offers
specials.subtitle: Outside the weekly schedule — holiday programmes and open pro training.

ferien.title: Holi Poldini — by Leopoldini
ferien.text: Four days of circus adventure during Whitsun holidays — acrobatics, juggling, handstand and more with the coaches of Circus Leopoldini.

pro.title: Professional Training
pro.subtitle: Daytime · open training for Munich's pro artists
pro.text: Supported by the Munich Department of Arts and Culture. Current times and updates are shared in a WhatsApp group — request access via the contact form, subject "Profitraining".

disciplines.title: Our disciplines
disciplines.subtitle: From aerial work to floor — the breadth of contemporary circus arts.

items.name: Aerial Arts
items.description: Vertical fabric, trapeze, aerial hoop, straps, Spanish web

items.name: Ground Arts
items.description: Handstand, acrobatics, contortion, Cyr wheel, juggling

location.title: A unique venue
location.ceilingText: Ideal conditions for aerial work of all kinds.
location.acousticsText: The geodesic dome shape provides excellent sound distribution.
location.parkText: Inside Munich's Ostpark — training in the green.

cta.title: Ready for your first session?
cta.text: Get in touch and step into the world of contemporary circus.
